title: Show trophy description on main page
description: Add the trophy description text to each row in the leaderboard table on the home page (src/pages/index.tsx). Currently only the trophy name, winner, and score are shown.

title: Show full task turnpoint names on hover
description: Task turnpoints are currently displayed as abbreviated trigraph codes (e.g. BUG-MEN-DUX). Add a tooltip (using the existing Tooltip component) that shows the full turnpoint names on hover. Applies to the trophy detail page and admin dashboard where Task is rendered.

title: Fix Complicity Cup scoring: pick max score per flight across pilots
description: The Complicity Cup (syndicate trophy) groups by glider registration and requires minPilots >= 2. Currently it takes the top N flights by crossCountryPoints regardless of pilot. The correct scoring should ensure the top flights include contributions from more than one pilot — i.e. for each flight slot, pick the best score but ensure the overall set includes flights from at least 2 different pilots.

title: Create admin dashboard page
description: New src/pages/admin.tsx: dense all-in-one page with all trophies. Each trophy section has heading with anchor ID, winner summary, expandable ranked results list with per-entry copy buttons and BGA verification links. TOC at top. See docs/plans/2026-02-20-user-flow-implementation.md Task 5.

title: Exclude Aidan's Discus flights from Bolly Challenge scoring
description: Aidan's flights in a Discus should be excluded from the Bolly Challenge trophy results. Need to add an exclude rule or filter for these specific flights.

title: Remove 'of' from Stats component attempt counts
description: In src/components/Stats.tsx, the FlightCategory shows 'of N attempts'. Change to just show 'N attempts' without the 'of' prefix.

title: Simplify public home page to clean leaderboard
description: Strip index.tsx down to clean trophy table (name link, winner, score per row). Remove CopyButton/WinnerDetails inline details. Wrap in PageLayout, add Stats card styling, add admin gear icon link. See docs/plans/2026-02-20-user-flow-implementation.md Task 2.

title: Add trophyNav helper for prev/next navigation
description: Create src/lib/trophyNav.ts with getTrophyNav(id) returning {current, prev, next} Trophy objects. TDD: write tests first in test/lib/trophyNav.test.ts. See docs/plans/2026-02-20-user-flow-implementation.md Task 3.

title: Visual foundation: theme tokens and PageLayout
description: Set up Cambridge blue/teal accent color in Tailwind v4 globals.css (@theme tokens), create PageLayout wrapper component (max-w-4xl, bg-gray-50), update Loading spinner to use PageLayout and teal accent. See docs/plans/2026-02-20-user-flow-implementation.md Task 1.

title: Update trophy detail page with nav and copy button
description: Add next/prev trophy navigation bar to [trophyId].tsx, add copy button on winner row, remove TrophyImage component, wrap in PageLayout, apply card styling. See docs/plans/2026-02-20-user-flow-implementation.md Task 4.

title: Support excluding specific pilots from trophy eligibility
description: Add a mechanism to exclude specific pilots from individual trophies. Currently exclusions work at the flight level (by flight ID). Need a way to exclude by pilot name, optionally combined with other criteria like glider type. This would support cases like excluding a pilot from a specific trophy based on their glider. Could be implemented as a new filter operation in the trophy DSL or as a config field on the trophy definition.

title: Set up .env and .env.private configuration
description: Create .env file with default/public config values and .env.private for sensitive overrides. Ensure .env.private is in .gitignore. Set up Next.js environment variable conventions (NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix for client-side vars vs server-only vars).

title: Read club name from environment variable
description: The club name (Cambridge Gliding Centre) and likely the BGA API club identifier are currently hardcoded. Make these configurable via environment variables so the app could be reused for other clubs. Check for hardcoded references in the API route (flights.ts), trophy config, page titles, and filtering logic (Gransden Lodge).

title: Remove stub /season/[season]/trophy/[trophy] route
description: Delete src/pages/season/[season]/trophy/[trophy].tsx (renders raw JSON, uses non-existent API). Verify no references exist. Run build to confirm. See docs/plans/2026-02-20-user-flow-implementation.md Task 7.

title: Tidy up 'One flight per pilot?' toggle
description: The toggle checkbox on the trophy detail page (src/pages/trophy/[trophyId].tsx, Toggle component) needs visual polish. Style it to match the Cambridge teal theme — consider using a styled toggle switch or at minimum better alignment, spacing, and teal accent on the checkbox.

title: Add IGC web viewer links to flight results
description: Add links to the IGC web viewer alongside the existing BGA ladder links on flight result rows. The URL format is already defined in trophyCopyData.ts (igcUrl). Add these to the trophy detail page and admin dashboard flight entries, using a map/globe icon or similar from lucide-react.

title: Polish Season picker and error components
description: Update Season.tsx with Cambridge teal hover colors. Wrap FlightLoadFailure.tsx and UnknownTrophy.tsx in PageLayout with styled content. See docs/plans/2026-02-20-user-flow-implementation.md Task 6.
